accurate.why: Accurate; the description of the 2023 rule's content and its replacement of the 2020 Navigable Waters Protection Rule is factually correct.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; contextual information about the Clean Water Act and rule history is accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as nullifying the WOTUS rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Explains the rule's nullification and the regulatory context.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in this resolution.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the resolution's sole operative effect with helpful context.
